# Audience

## Primary Audience

Senior technical decision makers who need to decide whether the proposed operating model is worth advancing.

## Secondary Audience

Platform and delivery leads who will need enough context to understand implementation implications.

## Audience Priority

The primary audience has priority. If technical detail competes with decision usefulness, the paper should preserve decision usefulness and move technical detail into supporting sections.

## Reader Questions

- What decision is being requested?
- Why does this need to change now?
- What options were considered?
- What trade-offs matter most?
- What happens if the recommendation is rejected or delayed?
